---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
labels: bug
---

**What did you ask Claude Code to annotate?**
<!-- e.g. "Annotate changes to a TypeScript React component" -->

**What went wrong?**
<!-- Describe the issue: wrong comment syntax, missing block, block placed at wrong location, section content inaccurate, trivial change annotated when it shouldn't be, etc. -->

**Expected behavior**
<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

**Claude Code version**
<!-- Run `claude --version` and paste the output -->

**Additional context**
<!-- The code snippet being annotated, the generated comment block, or anything else relevant -->
